channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: How AI is unlocking a cleaner energy future
item.description: The Fast Company Impact Council is a private membership community of influential leaders, experts, executives, and entrepreneurs who share their insights with our audience. Members pay annual membership dues for access to peer learning and thought leadership opportunities, events and more.
item.dc:creator: Rakesh Jaggi, Fast Company

item.title: Nvidia revenue forecasts for first quarter exceed estimates
item.description: Nvidia forecast first-quarter revenue above market estimates on Wednesday, expecting robust demand for its leading AI chips to persist as businesses spend heavily to expand generative artificial intelligence infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Amazon’s AI-powered Alexa+ wants to be your best friend—for $19.99 per month
item.description: Amazon on Wednesday unveiled a generative-AI infused Alexa that it says will allow the popular voice assistant to have more personality, check a user’s tone and even plan romantic dates.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft’s .NET 10 arrives in first preview
item.description: Microsoft has rolled out the first preview of .NET 10, a major new version of the company’s flagship software development platform. Likely to arrive as a production release in November, .NET 10 introduces C# 14 and adds major enhancements to the .NET runtime, SDK, libraries, ASP.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Former VA cybersecurity chief issues dire warning about data belonging to millions of veterans
item.description: Sensitive financial and health data belonging to millions of veterans and stored on a benefits website is at risk of being stolen or otherwise compromised, according to a federal employee tasked with cybersecurity who was recently fired as part of massive government-wide cuts.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Nvidia sales surge in the fourth quarter on demand for AI chips
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Nvidia on Wednesday reported a surge in fourth-quarter profit and sales as demand for its specialized Blackwell chips, which power artificial intelligence systems, continued to grow, sending the company's stock higher after hours. For the three months that ended Jan.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Hinge’s new feature wants to help trans and neurodivergent daters
item.description: Dating apps are a notoriously hostile space towards transgender users. If they list their transness in their profiles, they’re outing themselves to the world. If they don’t, matches could accuse them of catfishing. Picking the right time to tell matches can feel impossible.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Man who said he was upset with Musk and Trump charged with threatening to burn down xAI facility
item.description: ASHLAND CITY, Tenn. (AP) — A Tennessee man has been charged with an act of terrorism after he threatened to burn down an xAI facility because he was upset with its founder, Elon Musk, and President Donald Trump, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Meet the AI real estate agent making millions
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Startup Opkey launches agentic AI platform for ERP lifecycle optimization
item.description: Opkey, a startup with roots in ERP test automation, today unveiled its agentic AI-powered ERP Lifecycle Optimization Platform, saying it will simplify ERP management, reduce costs by up to 50%, and reduce testing time by as much as 85%.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Google Pixel 9a price details just leaked online – and there's good and bad news
item.description: If you're saving up to invest in a Google Pixel 9a later this year, these are the price leaks you need to know about.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: 3 California residents arrested in reported ‘pig butchering’ investment schemes totaling $13 million
item.description: Three people were arrested after reportedly creating shell companies that stole millions from victims of investment scams.
item.dc:creator: Andrea Klick, The Mercury News

item.title: Your next Android phone could get up to eight years of software updates – but there are catches
item.description: Android phones running the Snapdragon 8 Elite chip will get up to eight years of software and security support, with more to come.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: What gives IT leaders pause as they look to integrate agentic AI with legacy infrastructure
item.description: Agentic AI was the big breakthrough technology for gen AI last year, and this year, enterprises will deploy these systems at scale.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Why Nvidia’s earnings are important to the entire U.S. stock market
item.description: Nvidia stock’s movement carries more weight on the S&P 500 and other indexes than every company except Apple.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Sweden is investigating a damaged cable in the Baltic Sea
item.description: STOCKHOLM (AP) — Swedish authorities said on Friday they were investigating a damaged cable that was discovered in the Baltic Sea, the latest in a string of recent incidents of ruptured undersea cables that have heightened fears of Russian sabotage and spying in the region.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Apple drops encryption feature for UK users after government reportedly demanded backdoor access
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple said Friday it will stop offering an advanced data security option for British users after the government reportedly demanded that the company provide backdoor access for any data those users have stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: GenAI is my copilot? Developers weigh pains and gains
item.description: Developers are quicker than most to embrace generative AI tools as part of their workflow. That can mean enhanced productivity and easing cognitive burdens, but it also means learning new technologies while they’re still being built.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Huge data leak exposes 14 million customer shipping records
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says Hipshipper, which is used by eBay, Shopify and Amazon sellers, exposed millions of shipping labels.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Versa Networks launches sovereign SASE, challenging cloud-only security model
item.description: SASE since its inception has typically been deployed in a software-as-a-service (SaaS) model, delivering network security services from the cloud.
item.dc:creator: Network World
